name: Uruguay en Vinos
tagline: Bilingual wine content platform with articles, tastings, and book sales
description: A bilingual content platform for Uruguay en Vinos, featuring wine articles, tasting notes, and book pre-sales. Includes an admin panel for content management with a rich text editor, internationalization (ES/EN), Cloudinary image uploads, and email notifications. Integrates with an external CRM for book pre-sale orders.
highlights: Rich text editor for wine articles with Tiptap/Novel
Book pre-sale system integrated with external CRM
Admin panel with CRUD for articles, wines, categories, and tags
AI-powered content features with OpenAI and Groq
